CustomField.label: Data Query
CustomField.description: The SOQL that fetches what you are checking. Use merge tokens like {!Id} or {!AccountNumber} to insert values from the current record. Leave blank only when using the List includes any of / List excludes all of operators (use Pass/Fail Formula instead).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SOQL that returns the data to check. Insert record values with {!Id}, {!FieldApiName}, etc. Use COUNT() for "how many" checks.
